metadata.name: Vasishtha
metadata.primary_role: Royal Guru of Ayodhya / One of the Saptarishis (Seven Great Sages)
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Ancient Indian (Saptarishi, mind-born son of Brahma)
metadata.divine_origin: Mind-born son of Brahma, one of the seven primordial sages, owner of the divine cow Kamadhenu

timelines.context_description: The chief priest and royal guru of the Ikshvaku dynasty, guiding kings for generations.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Radiant aged fair complexion with a golden-white glow of spiritual fire (tapas), luminous and otherworldly
physical_appearance.height: Medium height, walks with measured dignified steps, straight-backed despite apparent age
physical_appearance.build: Lean ascetic build, thin from decades of fasting and meditation, but radiating enormous spiritual power
physical_appearance.facial_features: Serene ancient face with deep-set all-knowing eyes, long flowing white beard reaching his chest, high lined forehead, gentle wise smile, eyebrows like wisps of white cloud, a face of absolute peace and cosmic knowledge
physical_appearance.hair: Long white matted locks (Jata) piled high on his head in a sage's topknot, sacred grass threaded through
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Carries a radiant Kamandalu (water pot) and a divine staff, his presence calms all around him, the divine cow Kamadhenu sometimes appears behind him

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Simple white bark-cloth (Valkala) or cotton robes, a deerskin across one shoulder, sacred ash markings on forehead and arms
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: Only rudraksha mala (prayer beads), sacred thread (Yajnopavita), a small Kamandalu (water vessel) — no gold or gems
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: His divine staff (Brahma-danda) and the power of his spiritual austerities — his curses and blessings reshape reality

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Serene, authoritative, gentle but absolute — the voice of dharmic law, speaks and reality listens
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Deep, resonant elderly bass-baritone — unhurried, measured, echoing with spiritual power, like distant sacred bells
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks in elaborate Sanskrit verses, quotes Vedas naturally, his words carry the force of divine law, addresses kings as a gentle but firm teacher, his displeasure is expressed through silence rather than anger
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Absolute cosmic serenity, gentle authority of primordial wisdom, peaceful detachment with engaged compassion

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Cinematic portrait of Sage Vasishtha, royal guru of Ayodhya, age appears 80 but timeless. Radiant golden-white glowing complexion. Serene ancient face with deep all-knowing eyes, long flowing white beard, white matted hair in a sage's topknot. Lean ascetic build in simple white robes and deerskin. Holding a radiant Kamandalu and divine staff. Sacred fire burning nearby. Palace temple setting with carved pillars. Divine cow Kamadhenu visible in the background. 3D Pixar style, ethereal golden-white lighting, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A deep, resonant elderly bass-baritone voice of cosmic authority. Unhurried, measured, echoing with spiritual power. Like distant sacred bells. Timeless.
